NOTICE OF NON OPPOSITION TO FIRST AMERICAN'S MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFFS VEXATIOUS LITIGANTS AND SEEKING THE ISSUANCE OF A PREFILING ORDER AND THE FURNISHING OF SECURITY FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. RES JUDICATA BARS THIS ACTION. THE $75,000.00 CLAIM WAS LITIGATED IN NEVADA AND THAT CASE HAS BECOME FINAL. PLAINTIFF GOULD HAS NO STANDING AND IS NOT A REAL PARTY IN INTEREST. LITIGATION PRIVILEGE APPLIES TO POST JUDGMENT ENFORCEMENT ACTIVITIES. (CIVIL CODE SECTION 47.) NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECTS COULD BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFFS VEXATIOUS LITIGANTS AND SEEKING THE ISSUANCE OF A PREFILING ORDER; AND FURNISHING OF SECURITY. HEARING HELD. THE COURT HEARS ARGUMENT AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: ON AUGUST 25, 2009 THE COURT SUSTAINED DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF ALSO FILED A DISMISSAL ON THAT DATE. MOTION DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Demurrer
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FRANK RUPP, DOUGLAS GOULD'S Motion to Dismiss Demurrer. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Improper motion for reconsideration under CCP section 1008. Petitioner cites no new facts, circumstances or law for the Court's consideration. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Ntc Of Mtn To Declare Pltfs Vexatious Litigants And Seeking The Issuance Of A Prefiling Order And Thr Furnishing Of Security
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY Motion to Declare Plaintiffs Vexatious Litigants and Seeking the Issuance of a Prefiling Order; and Furnishing of Security. Appearances: Lisa Marie Black, Esq. of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith (415) 421-3400, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Hearing held. The Court hears argument and the Court rules as follows: On August 25, 2009 the Court sustained defendant's demurrer to the Amended Complaint without leave to amend. Plaintiff also filed a dismissal on that date. Motion denied without prejudice. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Lisa Marie Black, Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith (415) 421-3400, appearing for Respondent and moving party; Frank W. Rupp, Petitioner in Pro Per and opposing party, Appearing thru CourtCall (760) 673-7220; and, Douglas Gould Petitioner in Pro Per and opposing party, (415) 457-7372 appearing. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Res judicata Bars this action. The $75,000.00 claim was litigated in Nevada and that case has become final. Plaintiff Gould has no standing and is not a real party in interest. Litigation privilege applies to post judgment enforcement activities. (Civil Code section 47.) No reasonable probability that defects could be cured by amendment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Continued To Aug-25-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Appearances: Douglas Gould, Plaintiff in Pro Per and opposing party appearing; Frank Rupp, Plaintiff in Pro Per and opposing party, Appearing thru CourtCall. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to August 25, 2009. Petitioner/Plaintiff immediately to serve opposition on Respondent/Defendant and provide a courtesy copy to the Court. Respondent/Defendant to file a substantive reply and provide a courtesy copy by August 19, 2009. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Continued To Aug-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer To Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Demurrer To Complaint;
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY'S Demurrer To Complaint.
APPEARANCES: Douglas Gould, pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Lisa Marie Black, Esq. of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP 421-3400 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court considered plaintiff's opposition and sustained the demurrer with 21 days leave to amend. Plaintiff waives notice. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT GENERAL EDMUND G BROWN JR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiffs in Pro Per, Frank W. Rupp and Douglas Gould, (760) 969-0956, Appearing thru CourtCall. (S. Michele Inan, Deputy Attorney General, State of California, (415) 703-5474 appeared after the case was called.) Plaintiffs in Pro Per failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained, no opposition filed. Ten days leave to amend. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR # 13286
